properties.deal-breakers: 绝对不能有事实性错误
properties.code_requirement: 代码必须可运行，注重用户体验

label: Stock Analysis Toolchain
description: 完整股票分析工具链：stock-info-explorer(Yahoo Finance美股/韩股), us-stock-analysis(美股深度分析), aakshare(腾讯API A股实时行情+指数)

properties.description: 全栈后端架构与前后端集成
properties.trigger: building full-stack app, REST API, Express+React, Next.js API, Node.js backend, Python backend, Go backend

properties.description: UI设计、落地页、营销页面开发
properties.trigger: landing pages, marketing sites, product pages, dashboards, animations, AI-generated media
checking PR status, CI runs, creating issues, code review

properties.description: 复杂开发任务委托Codex/Claude Code
properties.trigger: building features, PR review, refactoring, iterative coding tasks

properties.description: Yahoo Finance实时行情+技术指标图表
properties.trigger: 查美股/韩股实时报价、ASCII趋势图，专业K线图表(RSI/MACD/Bollinger)
properties.tickers: 美股(AAPL,TSLA,NVDA), 韩股(005930.KS,000660.KS), 加密货币(BTC-USD)

properties.description: 美股深度分析（方法论skill，通过web search获取数据）
properties.trigger: 分析美股基本面、技术分析、美股横向对比、投资报告
properties.data_source: web search (Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, SEC filings, TradingView)

properties.description: A股实时行情（腾讯API，绕过eastmoney拦截）
properties.trigger: 查A股实时行情、指数（上证/深证/创业板/科创50）、个股报价

key_functions.get_quote: 获取个股实时行情，支持sh600000/sz000001格式
key_functions.get_index: 获取上证/深证/创业板/科创50指数

properties.akshare_backdoor: akshare原生长线接口（历史K线等，VPN下可能不可用）
